subcodes.first_line: O stranger of the Country of God! Thy letter arrived and the book edited in Persian with Hebrew characters was considered.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غریب دیار الهی نامه ات رسید و کتاب فارسی بحروف عبرانی ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @knowledge; recognition of God, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @unity; oneness of humanity
